# CWE-765: Multiple Unlocks of a Critical Resource (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-765-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"sync"
)

var walletMu sync.Mutex
var walletBalance int

// Vulnerable: unlocks the mutex twice when validation fails.
func DebitWallet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	amount, _ := strconv.Atoi(r.URL.Query().Get("amount"))
	walletMu.Lock()
	if amount <= 0 {
		walletMu.Unlock()
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		walletMu.Unlock()
		return
	}
	walletBalance -= amount
	walletMu.Unlock()
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]int{"balance": walletBalance})
}
